faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about our corporate web, mobile app, CRM/ERP, AI, and software services.

0.q: What services does Dahi Teknoloji offer?
0.a: We offer corporate website & e-commerce development, mobile app development, custom software & business management systems, CRM/ERP solutions, AI & automation, API & backend development, data analytics & reporting, and 24/7 technical support & maintenance.

1.a: We actively use React, Next.js, TypeScript, React Native, Flutter, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL, GraphQL, REST API, Docker, AWS, Azure, and many other modern technologies.

2.q: Can you build an e-commerce platform?
2.a: Yes, we develop comprehensive e-commerce platforms including payment system integration, inventory management, order tracking, and shipping integration. We can work with custom designs or existing frameworks.

3.q: Can you build a CRM or ERP system?
3.a: Yes, we develop custom CRM and ERP solutions for your business. We build systems with customer management, sales tracking, resource planning, and detailed reporting modules.

0.q: Do you offer AI and automation solutions?
0.a: Yes, we develop chatbot & smart assistant, business process automation, machine learning models, and natural language processing (NLP) solutions. We accelerate your business processes with AI.

1.q: Do you provide API and backend development?
1.a: Yes, we develop RESTful and GraphQL APIs, microservice architectures, and secure, scalable backend infrastructures based on Node.js and Python.

2.q: Which platforms do mobile apps work on?
2.a: We develop high-performance mobile apps that work on both iOS and Android using React Native and Flutter. A single codebase supports both platforms.

3.a: Yes, basic SEO optimization is included in all web projects. Technical SEO, page speed optimization, meta tags, structured data, and Google search results compatibility are applied as standard.

0.q: How long does it take to complete a project?
0.a: Depending on scope, corporate websites take 2-4 weeks, e-commerce and mobile apps 1-3 months, CRM/ERP and custom software projects 3-6 months.

1.q: Do you provide post-project technical support?
1.a: Yes, we offer 3 months of free technical support and maintenance for all projects. After that, we have maintenance packages with 24/7 support, security updates, performance optimization, and server management.

2.a: Yes, the initial meeting and project analysis are free. We listen to your needs and provide a custom solution proposal and quote.

3.q: What does the data analytics service include?
3.a: We build data visualization, business intelligence (BI) dashboards, custom reporting systems, and real-time analytics panels. We turn your data into meaningful insights.
